/usr/bin/ar qc liblibmapping.a CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/local_search_mapping.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/full_search_space.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/full_search_space_pruned.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/communication_graph_search_space.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/fast_construct_mapping.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/construct_distance_matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/mapping_algorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libmapping.dir/__/__/extern/KaHIP/lib/mapping/construct_mapping.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblibmapping.a
